basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Chulane as a GWU creature value/ramp/draw Commander anchor.
Public Commander and cEDH sources label Chulane as a Commander deck commander.
Creature-loop cEDH lines should be bracket-aware.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Prioritize cheap creatures, bounce loops, and land-drop exploitation.
Deterministic Aluren/loop packages are high-power/cEDH signals, not mandatory casual defaults.

themes.name: creature_value_ramp_draw
themes.notes: Chulane turns creature casts into cards, land drops, and board velocity.

themes.name: etb_bounce_loops
themes.notes: Cheap self-bounce creatures and Curio-style loops repeatedly trigger Chulane.

themes.name: bant_creature_combo
themes.notes: Tutors and protection support compact high-power creature loops.

examples: Bant control pile with low creature count
avoid_patterns.reason: Chulane needs creature casts to draw and ramp.

examples: generic landfall package without ETB creatures
avoid_patterns.reason: Land drops are enabled by creature casting and should not replace the core engine.
Red and black combo imports are outside Chulane color identity.
